title: Travel Mode
description: When Travel Mode is active, only entries marked as travel-safe are visible. This helps protect sensitive data when crossing borders.
securityNote: Note: Travel Mode filters entries on the client side. All encrypted data remains on the server. This provides a UI-level safeguard, not a cryptographic boundary.
enableConfirm: Are you sure you want to enable Travel Mode? Only travel-safe entries will be visible.
disableDescription: Enter your vault passphrase to disable Travel Mode and restore access to all entries.
passphraseRequired: Passphrase is required to disable Travel Mode.
enabled: Travel Mode enabled. Only travel-safe entries are visible.
disabled: Travel Mode disabled. All entries are now visible.
travelSafeDescription: Show this entry when Travel Mode is active
